Overview We are a pharmaceutical company dedicated to maximizing the commercial potential of ORLYNVAH , the first oral branded penem available in the United States and potentially the first and only oral and intravenous (IV) branded penem available globally. Penems, including thiopenems and carbapenems, belong to a class of antibiotics more broadly defined as -lactam antibiotics, the original example of which was penicillin, but which now also includes cephalosporins.
